## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- user or developer impact

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `python -m twine check dist/*`

## Compatibility Notes

- [ ] Legacy MATLAB / Scilab naming preserved where expected
- [ ] README and docstrings updated for public API changes
- [ ] Benchmark or regression coverage updated when solver behavior changed
